meaning: n.(旅行用)手提箱或手提袋
examples: He shivered, humping his canvas holdall higher onto his shoulder.
He pulled his holdall straight to the door to the lift.
He emerged from the night train from London, scuffed leather holdall in one hand.
"I saw all of her kit, even on her holdall it says 'Great Britain Tracey Morris', it's absolutely mad, " added Ms Hodgson.
When their vehicle was searched, officers found a sword, a section of hosepipe, a hammer and a holdall containing a spike, black bags and tape.
